The Ferni Fund

Ferni is free.
For everyone.

No tiers. No catches. The full team, unlimited time, complete memory. Everyone deserves support.

Start talking to Ferni

How Ferni stays free

Ferni costs money to run—AI, servers, and a small team of humans who care deeply about this work. We stay free because some people choose to gift forward.

Everyone gets everything

Full team access. Unlimited time. Complete memory. No exceptions.

Some choose to give

Those who can, gift forward. Not for features—for others.

Everyone benefits

Your gift keeps Ferni free for someone who needs it.

Gift Forward

If Ferni has helped you

You're not buying features. You're funding someone else's experience. Choose what feels right.

Keeps Ferni free for 2 people

A small gift that makes a real difference. You're helping someone have conversations that matter.

Transparency

AI & Infrastructure

The Team

Gratitude

People keeping Ferni free

These are the humans who've chosen to gift forward. Because of them, Ferni is free for everyone.

Display is optional. Many choose to give anonymously.

Questions

About the Ferni Fund

Is Ferni really free? What's the catch?
No catch. Full team access. Unlimited time. Complete memory. Everyone gets everything. We believe support should be accessible to all, not just those who can pay. The Ferni Fund exists so those who can give, can help keep it free for those who can't.
What do I get if I gift forward?
You get the knowledge that someone else has access because of you. That's it. No special features, no premium tier. Just the same Ferni everyone else gets—plus the quiet satisfaction of helping others. You can optionally appear on our Gratitude Wall, and we'll send you quarterly updates on the impact you've made.
Can I change or stop my gift?
Absolutely. Increase, decrease, or stop anytime from your account settings. No questions, no guilt. Life changes. We get it.
How does "$5 keeps Ferni free for 2 people" work?
We calculate the average cost per active user per month—AI, servers, everything. Right now, it's about $2.50 per person. So a $5 gift covers you plus one other person. $15 covers six. We update this number as our costs change, and publish the math in our transparency reports.
What if the Ferni Fund doesn't cover costs?
We've built Ferni lean on purpose. The founders put in personal runway to get us here. Our goal is community sustainability—if enough people who can give, do, we stay free forever. If we ever face a real shortfall, we'll be transparent about it and figure it out together.

Ferni is free because someone believed you deserved support.

If you can, gift that forward.

Talk to Ferni (Free) Gift Forward
